126167.explanation: It is important that both men and women are represented because they can have different experiences and perspectives. At the same time, the emphasis should be on equal opportunities and suitability, not just on numbers.

126168.explanation: For important matters, such as the N65, PHS, etc., the voice of the resident is important to hear.

126171.explanation: This depends on the situation; we support broader options.

126172.explanation: If this leads to cooperation and ultimately benefits the residents.

126174.explanation: Our municipality already faces a major challenge with care and detention. Status holders and Ukrainian reception are already beyond what the task requires.

126175.explanation: To meet their own needs, this must be possible.

126181.explanation: What is stricter? Where festivals or parties occur occasionally, the possibilities should be considered.

126183.explanation: Rural plots may qualify as expansion areas if the farmer is open to it and it fits within zoning plan changes.

126184.explanation: We support inclusion so that everyone can participate in sports and physical activities.

126186.explanation: Agree, and it is being fully pursued.

126190.explanation: BOA officers would be a solution if they had more authority; sometimes it is too limited.

126191.explanation: Due to the local situation, there is already extensive camera surveillance; where necessary, expansion should be possible.

126192.explanation: We already have this in our municipality.

126197.explanation: All options should be considered and not excluded in advance.

126198.explanation: Everyone participates in society as long as they are physically and mentally able.

126202.explanation: Where necessary, the municipality looks together with residents for suitable locations.

126206.explanation: For that, the calculation method must also be revised, which Municipal Interests supports.

126209.explanation: Vught should look at possibilities on the outskirts of Vught to also reduce traffic in the villages.

126214.explanation: This is a private clubhouse for which they take care themselves.

126219.explanation: This is stated in Vught’s housing vision.

126220.explanation: If this fits in the environment, numbers are not leading but quality is.

126222.explanation: Entrepreneurs must remain accessible, and elderly people must also be able to get there easily.

126223.explanation: Wherever there are opportunities, we must apply them.

126224.explanation: Municipal Interests wants research into the possibilities within the IJzerenman.

126225.explanation: Renovation must be sufficient to meet Vught’s needs.

126167.explanation: A proportional distribution is important but not always possible.

126168.explanation: The current way of gauging residents’ opinions through participation and consultation can work sufficiently, but we are not opposed to a consultative referendum.

126171.explanation: Only if this fits within the policy for the rural area and the environmental vision.

126172.explanation: Initiatives that contribute to the energy transition in our municipality deserve appropriate support.

126174.explanation: Our municipality must comply with the dispersal law and work with the COA to find suitable locations.

126175.explanation: Appropriate housing for seasonal workers is the responsibility of employers.

126181.explanation: As long as noise standards within legal frameworks for both nature and habitation are truly enforced.

126183.explanation: Only if this fits within the policy for the rural area and the environmental vision.

126184.explanation: There are currently sufficient arrangements and organizations that provide such support.

126186.explanation: Only invest in school buildings that lag behind the standards described in the IHP.

126190.explanation: Currently, there are sufficient BOAs employed.

126191.explanation: Camera surveillance should only be considered in very unsafe locations.

126192.explanation: This should be investigated in the context of combating gender-related and other domestic violence.

126194.explanation: The current rules are sufficient to grant priority to these housing seekers under strict conditions.

126197.explanation: If infill and other project locations are no longer available to meet the new construction ambition, areas outside the village boundaries must also be considered.

126202.explanation: The number of charging points must continue to follow the trend of electric car ownership in our municipality.

126203.explanation: This increases safety and prevents shortcut traffic.

126204.explanation: This freedom of choice cannot be guaranteed.

126206.explanation: The property tax (OZB) in our municipality has lagged behind the national trend and could be increased for a balanced budget.

126209.explanation: There is virtually no room for this, although we do want to stimulate the optimization of existing business parks.

126211.explanation: As long as the asylum chain is congested, this will be necessary.

126214.explanation: The clubhouse is the responsibility of the club itself. To be able to grow as a club, the changing rooms must meet minimum requirements.

126219.explanation: This percentage should even be temporarily higher to compensate for the lagging segment in realized new construction.

126220.explanation: The Vught standard is that only limited high-rise buildings are allowed.

126222.explanation: The hospitality industry and shops must remain accessible, whereby priority can be given to slow traffic at the expense of car traffic.

126223.explanation: Only new construction in designated expansion areas may be allowed.

126224.explanation: The recreational pressure on this nature area is already very high.

126225.explanation: Renovation of the current building or rebuilding at another location is preferred.

126167.explanation: The VVD stands for equal opportunities, but not for mandatory equality in numbers. When composing the executive board, quality, experience, and suitability must be decisive. Fixed quotas or enforceable ratios do not fit this.

126168.explanation: The VVD opts for participation in advance. Residents must be able to think along and discuss plans at an early stage. A referendum afterward does not fit careful decision-making on complex matters by elected representatives.

126171.explanation: The VVD supports entrepreneurship in rural areas. Farmers must be given the space to expand their business with, for example, a shop or campsite, as long as this fits within existing rules for safety, environment, and livability.

126172.explanation: The VVD is open to initiatives and cooperation among residents but opts for a uniform and coherent approach. Structural financial support for loose local initiatives can lead to fragmentation. Clear frameworks and a consistent policy ensure effective and fair governance.

126174.explanation: The VVD is against an asylum seekers center in Vught. The municipality already houses more Ukrainian refugees than requested. For a small municipality like Vught, more shelter is not appropriate.

126175.explanation: The VVD wants fewer rules and more room for entrepreneurship. Employers bear responsibility for good housing but should be able to decide what fits best. Mandatory solutions go too far; other suitable forms of housing are also fine.

126181.explanation: For the VVD, tightening noise standards is not a goal in itself. It is about clear and workable agreements. We see no need for stricter standards; with clear rules and good compliance, nuisance can be limited.

126183.explanation: The VVD supports more room for farmers to build homes on their land themselves. Especially in times of housing shortage, we must be open to new ways to add homes, provided they are carefully integrated and fit within spatial and landscape frameworks.

126184.explanation: The VVD finds sport important, but full payment of sports memberships by the municipality goes too far. Support must be targeted and temporary. Personal responsibility remains the premise, with customization where really needed.

126186.explanation: Good education requires a good school building. The VVD wants to invest in safe and future-proof schools. Where renovation is needed, we should not wait too long. Sustainability and lower energy consumption are important points of attention, with regard to priority and affordability.

126190.explanation: Everyone must feel safe in Vught. If extra deployment of enforcement officers (BOAs) contributes to visibility, enforcement, and residents’ sense of safety, the VVD supports this. Their deployment must be effective and cooperate well with police and partners.

126191.explanation: The VVD sees no immediate need for additional camera surveillance in the centers. However, we are open to camera surveillance in rural areas where this can contribute to safety, such as along routes between Helvoirt and Oisterwijk and from Vught towards Den Bosch.

126192.explanation: The VVD considers good shelter and protection for victims of domestic violence essential. Whether a women’s shelter ('stay-away-from-me house') is needed and feasible in Vught requires careful consideration. Quality, safety, and regional cooperation are paramount.

126194.explanation: The VVD values local ties. With scarce social rental housing, priority for housing seekers from the own municipality can contribute to livability and involvement. This must fit within legal frameworks.

126197.explanation: The VVD is against principled opposition to new construction outside existing village boundaries. Due to housing shortage, tailor-made solutions are needed. New locations can contribute, provided they are carefully integrated with attention to landscape, livability, and infrastructure.

126198.explanation: The VVD believes working to capacity belongs with social assistance benefits. Socially meaningful work helps people stay active, develop skills, and increases the chance of moving to paid work, with attention to customization and personal circumstances.

126202.explanation: The VVD sees the importance of charging infrastructure but currently sees no reason to expand the number of charging points. The need should be monitored. Currently, there are too few fast charging points.

126203.explanation: The VVD finds traffic safety important, but a general lowering to 30 km/h is not needed everywhere. It must be assessed per street and neighborhood what is appropriate. Customization, clear design, and enforcement are more effective than a generic measure.

126204.explanation: The VVD values choice freedom in care, but 'always being able to choose' goes too far. Care must be accessible, affordable, and of good quality. The VVD assumes care providers can offer an inclusive range that meets diverse backgrounds.

126206.explanation: The VVD wants housing costs to remain affordable. There is currently no reason to lower the property tax (OZB), but also not to raise it. Housing costs in Vught have decreased in recent years due to VVD policy. Costs are around the national average. Stability and healthy municipal finances come first.

126209.explanation: The VVD sees the importance of space for entrepreneurship. In Vught, it is mainly about logically concentrating businesses to improve livability and accessibility. Once parks are better organized, targeted expansion can then take place more carefully.

126211.explanation: The VVD opposes structurally giving priority to status holders in social rental housing. Scarce homes must be fairly distributed, with attention to local housing seekers. Integration is important but must not come at the expense of equal treatment.

126214.explanation: The VVD is against specifically renewing a single community building with municipal funds. Investments must be weighed equally and carefully. A club must first demonstrate that it is future-proof. Own responsibility and substantiation are paramount.

126219.explanation: The VVD opposes a fixed percentage of social housing in new construction. Approximately 28% of the housing stock in the Netherlands already consists of social housing. New construction requires a tailor-made approach per location, with attention to housing accessibility, middle incomes, and a balanced housing market.

126220.explanation: The VVD is cautious about high residential towers in Vught. They often do not fit with the village character. Housing construction must match the surroundings, with attention to scale, quality, and support so that livability is maintained.

126222.explanation: The VVD is against a car-free center in Vught. The center is easily accessible and not overly busy. Therefore, a car-free policy is unnecessary and would come at the expense of accessibility for residents, entrepreneurs, and visitors.

126223.explanation: The VVD is open to new construction in green areas if it contributes to solving the housing shortage. This requires careful choices, with respect for nature and landscape and good integration, so that living and green stay in balance.

126224.explanation: The VVD is cautious about further development at De IJzeren Man. The location has been used more intensively in recent years, which is noticeable in the immediate surroundings. Therefore, a hotel is not our direct preference at this specific location. Any plans require careful consideration.

126225.explanation: The VVD recognizes the need for a future-proof socio-cultural facility in Vught. Whether replacement of Theater De Speeldoos is necessary requires careful consideration of costs, functionality, and alternatives, such as redevelopment or adaptation of the existing building.

126167.explanation: The municipal administration should be a good reflection of the people living in our municipality. With an equal number of men and women, that is. In such an administration, all perspectives are represented to make fair decisions.

126168.explanation: When an issue is very important, a referendum can be a good and fair way to make a decision. This way, we involve people in local democracy.

126171.explanation: Agriculture must become significantly more sustainable, but we also want farmers to be able to earn money with their business. A shop with good products from their own land or a nice campsite can help with this. That is why we want to make these options possible, provided this does not come at the expense of nature.

126172.explanation: This is the ideal picture: residents jointly produce their own green and affordable electricity with a wind turbine or solar panels. They use the electricity onsite, so the grid is not burdened. Energy cooperatives are an asset to our municipality and should be encouraged.

126174.explanation: Every municipality must comply with the Dispersion Act and contribute its part to the asylum reception crisis.

126175.explanation: Those who bring people to our municipality to work must ensure these workers have decent housing without burdening our residents. There is no place for exploitation and nuisance in our municipality.

126181.explanation: Nuisance to the environment must be limited. Legal standards must be met.

126183.explanation: There is a huge housing shortage and an extra home on the property can be a good solution. As an additional income source or as a suitable place for a parent who can no longer live independently. We want to make this possible for farmers who want it.

126184.explanation: Sports provide a lot of energy and satisfaction. And it keeps you healthy. But for people with an income up to 130% of the social assistance level, sports are often too expensive. As far as we are concerned, the municipality should ensure that this group can join a sports club for free. In Vught, arrangements are already in place for this.

126186.explanation: A good school requires a good building. It is the municipality’s responsibility to provide school buildings where safe and pleasant learning is possible. Investing in that is investing in our future.

126190.explanation: The municipality already has a considerable number of BOAs (special enforcement officers) who effectively and sufficiently enforce safety.

126191.explanation: It is very important to feel safe on the street. But we do not believe adding more cameras is the right solution. Your privacy is a great asset that should not be compromised lightly.

126192.explanation: In the Den Bosch region, there are already women's shelters, including one in Vught. These must therefore remain, agreed. The residents of Vught can use them, and the municipality also contributes to the costs.

126194.explanation: Our home seekers can find housing throughout the entire region. We, as Vught, are not an island and should arrange this regionally.

126197.explanation: We want to preserve and protect the greenery around our town as best as possible. But to address the housing shortage, we must also use agricultural land and/or former recreational sites for housing. This is also an opportunity to create pleasant, green neighborhoods for our residents.

126198.explanation: People are not on social assistance because they don't want to work. They need a stable base and trust from the municipality. Additional demands and conditions create more uncertainty. The municipality may encourage people to become socially active.

126202.explanation: Especially in the center, there are currently too few charging points. Sufficient charging points contribute to a transition to more sustainable energy use.

126203.explanation: The figures clearly show: a lower maximum speed makes traffic in our municipality much safer. For cycling children and elderly people with reduced mobility, this makes a huge difference. Moreover, the streets become quieter and the air cleaner.

126204.explanation: We, as PvdA-GroenLinks, stand for an inclusive municipality in which everyone can participate.

126206.explanation: The municipality receives less and less money from the national government to perform its (legal) tasks. If we want to maintain the current level of municipal services, we need sufficient income, to which the property tax (OZB) contributes.

126209.explanation: However, only for relocating nuisance-causing companies (mainly transport companies) from the built-up area to outside the built-up area. This reduces traffic nuisance, especially in the villages Helvoirt and Cromvoirt.

126211.explanation: This creates flow in emergency reception centers (AZCs) and thus contributes to solving the asylum reception crisis. Moreover, there are priority rules for other target groups as well.

126214.explanation: The canteen can be further made sustainable (insulation, solar panels) to also lower operating costs. The changing rooms need to be completely renovated or replaced.

126219.explanation: According to PvdA-GroenLinks, this may even be 40% in the coming years. In Vught, only 24% of the homes are social rental housing, and this must be corrected to at least 30%. This is to counter further segregation; Vught should not become the Wassenaar of North Brabant.

126220.explanation: The scale of our villages is not suitable for more high-rise residential towers. With the current plans for Leyhoeve and Van der Valk, the available locations for high-rise buildings will already be built on.

126222.explanation: We make our villages as car-free and bicycle-friendly as possible, creating more space for trees, cozy terraces, and facilities (for example, a boule court) that contribute to social connection in the center of Vught.

126223.explanation: We want to preserve and protect the greenery around our town as best as possible. But to address the housing shortage, we must also use agricultural land and former recreational sites for housing. This is also an opportunity to create pleasant, green neighborhoods for our residents.

126224.explanation: De IJzeren Man remains the green jewel of Vught and belongs to all of us. We do not want further commercial expansion, but do support small-scale recreation with a beach along the boulevard and good changing facilities. This way, everyone can enjoy De IJzeren Man.

126225.explanation: Together with MDM, Art and Friendship, and other users, we are exploring how to shape a new socio-cultural center. This could be renovation of Theater De Speeldoos or new construction on the current site. PvdA-GroenLinks does not exclude new construction elsewhere in the center of Vught.

126167.explanation: Agree and disagree. Certainly desirable, but practically challenging. What if the coalition party(ies) have no local female candidates, and a councilor from outside the municipality is not accepted by those coalition parties?

126168.explanation: The municipality of Vught applies active citizen participation (based on formal policy, "Making Vught Together"). Participation is aligned with the type of policy preparation. But ultimately, the municipal council decides on difficult issues; that is what it is elected for.

126171.explanation: Provided that it is feasible. It may be that traffic pressure does not correspond to what the local road network can handle and thus compromises traffic safety. Or that nature is heavily burdened. Or both.

126172.explanation: Civil servant support for residents and local parties in planning and preparation is certainly desirable; direct financial support is, in the CDA's view, undesirable.

126174.explanation: Yes and no. Yes, because the CDA believes asylum seekers should be offered assistance and shelter. No, because more than 300 Ukrainian refugees are already being accommodated in the municipality. Both asylum seekers and Ukrainian refugees cannot be accommodated by the Vught community at the same time.

126175.explanation: CDA Vught believes that employers have responsibility for housing seasonal workers they bring to the Netherlands. And that cannot always be on their own company premises.

126181.explanation: Noise standards are determined in advance in the permit process, based on legal standards and local regulations. These are strict enough. The problem lies in enforcement when permits are not respected.

126183.explanation: We want to tackle the housing shortage, but only under the conditions set by the Environmental Plan and the Rural Area Vision.

126184.explanation: It depends on the case and financial situation. When there are debt problems and/or payment issues, a contribution from the municipality is appropriate.

126186.explanation: This already happens in Vught based on the Integrated Housing Plan for education and childcare. The IHP is the multi-year maintenance and management plan for all schools in the municipality of Vught.

126190.explanation: At this moment, the municipality of Vught has 7.5 full-time equivalent BOA capacity, which is sufficient.

126191.explanation: Vught already has extensive camera surveillance, primarily due to the Extra Secured Institution (EBI). That is sufficient.

126192.explanation: Yes, because unfortunately there are too few of these homes and domestic or sexual violence still occurs in the Netherlands (and thus also in Vught). But a home like this in Vught must have the anonymity needed for such shelter. We believe that anonymity can only be found in large cities.

126194.explanation: Absolutely agree. Since October 2025, Vught has a priority system for home seekers with ties to the municipality: at least 50% of the affordable and accessible new-build owner-occupied homes are allocated with priority to home seekers connected to the municipality.

126197.explanation: Sometimes it is quite possible and desirable that building outside the village boundaries is allowed.

126198.explanation: Doing socially meaningful work contributes to self-esteem and social involvement (participation), so yes. At the same time, there is a group of welfare recipients who have serious problems and cannot do volunteer work, so no. It is not that black and white.

126202.explanation: There are now enough of them.

126203.explanation: The maximum speed has already been reduced to 30 km/h in many places within the municipality of Vught. On the main roads in the built-up area, 50 km/h is safe.

126204.explanation: People who need care should ideally always be able to choose a caregiver with a matching worldview, because this improves the quality of care and aligns with self-worth. Ideally, because this is not always practically possible or financially feasible.

126206.explanation: Property tax (OZB) is at a fine level.

126209.explanation: To give entrepreneurs further room for growth, a new industrial area is needed. A location along the N65 is an obvious choice: firstly, it improves accessibility and visibility of businesses, and secondly, it can reduce traffic nuisance in the village centers.

126211.explanation: Removing priority does not or hardly contributes to solving the housing crisis: the average waiting time in the Netherlands remains about 9-10 years, plus or minus a month. What should happen is imposing an occupancy obligation on status holders.

126214.explanation: First we need to see if Real Lunet is viable. Real Lunet has received financial means from the municipality to pay off outstanding debts. Now it is up to the organization to prove its viability. After that, we will proceed with further discussions.

126219.explanation: There is a great need for social rental housing, also in Vught. So a resounding yes.

126220.explanation: Maximum 20-25 meters, also depending on the size and scale of the environment in which building occurs. Yes, but also no, because not everywhere.

126222.explanation: Car-free is undesirable. It puts residents and shopkeepers in an impossible position: both the livability of the center and the earning capacity of local businesses are undermined.

126223.explanation: Yes, under conditions. The environmental vision and vision for the rural area provide a strict framework and require preserving the landscape character of the countryside.

126224.explanation: There simply is no room for that.

126225.explanation: Renovation of the existing building is better and cheaper. It is important that the Speeldoos becomes again the vibrant cultural heart of our municipality.

126167.explanation: We believe that the best people should be elected, but also that there must be good representation of the residents, and in our view this is always a balance that needs to be sought.

126168.explanation: As the SP, we value the opinions of residents; they must have a say about what happens in their municipality and surroundings.

126171.explanation: The possibilities of the designation on and near the business must be examined.

126172.explanation: The generation of sustainable energy is necessary to meet the challenge we have as a municipality. When residents want and can take this on themselves, the municipality should support them so that all residents benefit from it.

126174.explanation: As a municipality, we must at least meet our obligation for refugee reception. If that can be done without a reception center, then one does not need to be established. If it nevertheless becomes necessary, it can be shaped in good dialogue with residents.

126175.explanation: When seasonal workers come to work on business parks in the municipality, they must be properly accommodated and housed.

126181.explanation: Depending on the type of festival or event and the proximity and nuisance, variations are possible and it does not necessarily have to be stricter, but it can be.

126183.explanation: With the housing shortage there is, extra construction must be stimulated. Based on the number of homes built, a fair price distribution can possibly be considered.

126184.explanation: Everyone has the right to play sports. As a municipality, we want our residents to be healthy, and lack of money should not be a barrier.

126186.explanation: When necessary, we as a municipality have the task to improve school buildings. However, not all school buildings will need that in the coming council period.

126190.explanation: Enforcers ensure the safety of our residents and we must promote that.

126191.explanation: Camera surveillance does not necessarily improve safety; people are needed for that. In addition, it is an infringement on the privacy of our residents.

126192.explanation: Residents of the municipality must have a safe place to go when faced with threats. A place where they are out of an unsafe environment but still have access to their trusted network.

126194.explanation: Residents who have been searching for a social rental home in their own area for a long time should also be able to remain in that place.

126197.explanation: If there is a suitable location outside the village boundaries, it must be seriously considered and not rejected outright.

126198.explanation: If people are able to do so, it can be asked of them. If they are not able, they have the right to welfare benefits without having to do socially meaningful work.

126202.explanation: The municipality must designate electric charging points based on the number of electric cars and their charging needs.

126203.explanation: Depending on specific roads, this can improve safety. This does not apply to all roads within the built-up area.

126204.explanation: If that preference exists, the possibility must be examined. Shortages in care mean that it cannot always be accommodated.

126206.explanation: The property tax (OZB) does not need to be lowered. It is currently around the national average.

126209.explanation: Space requirements of entrepreneurs must be examined together. This does not necessarily translate into more industrial estates; it can also be a small number of large sites.

126211.explanation: This is part of our statutory duty, and as the SP, we believe we should adhere to these tasks.

126214.explanation: The clubhouse of Real Lunet is very outdated and does not provide the best environment for residents to participate in sports.

126219.explanation: As far as we are concerned, the percentage may increase. This way, we can partly make up for the backlog of recent years.

126220.explanation: The SP believes that we must do everything possible to counteract the housing shortage. Residential flats offer suitable space for various target groups on a smaller piece of land.

126222.explanation: The center of Vught must be accessible to all residents, including those who are less mobile and need a car to get there.

126223.explanation: It depends on the type of housing and the green area to be considered in this regard, but it would not be preferred.

126224.explanation: Recreation park De Ijzeren Man is a beautiful area that attracts many residents because of the green, wooded surroundings. This must be preserved and will be diminished by the expansion with a hotel.

126225.explanation: According to the SP, it is time for an inclusive and modern socio-cultural center where all residents are welcome and feel at home.

126168.explanation: Consulting residents should be a matter of course. You don’t need a referendum for that.

126171.explanation: If it contributes to the preservation of our specific coulisse landscape and the retention of young agricultural entrepreneurs, based on a nature-inclusive or organic farming approach.

126172.explanation: For the initiation phase, yes, but the business case should not depend on government support.

126174.explanation: Our specific municipality is not suitable for that.

126175.explanation: Taking decent living conditions into consideration.

126181.explanation: The sector must meet strict standards, but these must be enforced.

126183.explanation: Depending on the Space for Space scheme, VAB policy, and vision for the rural area.

126186.explanation: For that, we have an Integrated Housing Plan that sets the frameworks. Moreover, they themselves receive funds from the national government for maintenance activities.

126190.explanation: Better instructing the current enforcement officers (BOAs).

126191.explanation: More police presence on the streets.

126192.explanation: Femicide and hatred against women occur more often than you think, and we need to be alert about this. So, facilities must also be provided.

126194.explanation: Most home seekers want to stay within their own habitat. Therefore, the local housing supply should remain available for the village.

126197.explanation: Preservation of the rural living environment. Infill takes precedence over expansion.

126198.explanation: But social involvement applies to everyone.

126203.explanation: 30 km/h zones in built-up areas significantly reduce traffic accidents.

126204.explanation: There must be freedom of choice regarding religion, culture, and beliefs.

126209.explanation: Business activity is the lifeblood on which we as a small community depend.

126219.explanation: For that, we have a Housing Vision.

126223.explanation: Livability also means greenery in the area. So, you should not build it all up. Green also provides better mental resilience. Moreover, we must cherish our coulisse landscape.

126225.explanation: And include the possibility of the Venvulas building in that.

statements.title: The municipality should replace Theater de Speeldoos with a new socio-cultural center.
Residents of Vught should be able to express their opinion on important issues via a referendum.

titleParts.text: De inwoners van Vught moeten over belangrijke onderwerpen hun mening kunnen geven via een

titleParts.glossary: A public consultation where residents can express their opinion on a political issue. The municipal council is not obliged to follow the result; legally it cannot.

statements.title: The municipality should always allow farmers to open, for example, a shop or a campsite at their farm.
The new college of mayor and aldermen must have an equal number of men and women.

titleParts.glossary: The college of mayor and aldermen, the municipality’s executive board.
The mayor leads the municipality and chairs the municipal council. The mayor is not elected but appointed by the national government, after recommendation by the municipal council.

titleParts.text: en wethouders moet het aantal mannen en vrouwen gelijk zijn.

statements.title: Residents who want to generate sustainable energy together should receive financial support from the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Energy based on resources that are effectively infinite, such as sunlight and wind.

titleParts.text: op willen wekken, moeten financiële steun krijgen van de gemeente.

statements.title: The maximum speed limit in built-up areas should be set to 30 km/h.

titleParts.glossary: The maximum speed that cars and motorcycles are allowed to drive on the road.
An area with buildings (houses, other structures).

statements.title: Vught should have more municipal enforcement officers (BOAs) who focus on safety.

titleParts.glossary: People who, for the municipality, check whether citizens and businesses comply with the rules.

titleParts.text: (boa’s) komen die zich met veiligheid bezighouden.

statements.title: An asylum seekers' center (AZC) should be established in our municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Reception center for asylum seekers. They live there until it is decided whether they may stay in the Netherlands. An asylum seekers’ center remains in a municipality for a long time.

statements.title: When allocating social housing, applicants from the municipality should be given priority.

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

titleParts.text: moeten woningzoekenden uit de eigen gemeente voorrang krijgen.

statements.title: People who need care should always be able to choose a caregiver who matches their religion, culture, or beliefs.

titleParts.text: Mensen die zorg nodig hebben, moeten altijd kunnen kiezen voor een zorgverlener die past bij hun geloof, cultuur of

titleParts.glossary: What someone believes about life, such as a religion or personal conviction.

statements.title: In Vught there should be more camera surveillance.

titleParts.glossary: Monitoring of a building, area, or (groups of) people using security cameras.

statements.title: Noise standards at festivals and parties must be made stricter.
The municipality should allow new construction in green areas in Vught.
The municipality should pay the membership fees for a sports club for people receiving social assistance.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet het lidmaatschap van een sportclub betalen voor mensen met een

titleParts.glossary: Money from the municipality for people who have no income or personal funds.

statements.title: More high-rise residential buildings should be allowed in the municipality of Vught.
The municipality should invest money in improving all school buildings during the next council term.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet in de komende

titleParts.glossary: The municipal council is elected for a period of four years.

titleParts.text: geld steken in het verbeteren van alle schoolgebouwen.

statements.title: People receiving social assistance should, in return, do socially useful work.

titleParts.glossary: Money from the municipality for people who have no income or personal funds.
For example cleaning the streets or keeping company and supporting elderly residents.

statements.title: At least 30% of the newly built homes in Vught should be social-rent housing. In the Netherlands currently 28% of homes are social-rent housing.

titleParts.text: Van de nieuw te bouwen woningen in Vught moet minimaal 30% een

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

titleParts.text: zijn. In Nederland is nu 28% van de woningen een

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

statements.title: The property tax (onroerendezaakbelasting, OZB) should be reduced.

titleParts.glossary: Tax you pay as the owner of a building or piece of land, or as the user of a commercial property.
Property tax. Tax you pay as the owner of a building or piece of land, or as the user of a commercial property.

statements.title: Employers in agriculture and horticulture should provide housing for seasonal workers on their own premises.

titleParts.text: Werkgevers in de land- en tuinbouw moeten zelf zorgen voor de huisvesting van

titleParts.glossary: People who do work that only takes place during certain seasons, often in agriculture and fruit picking.

statements.title: There should be a women's shelter (domestic violence shelter) in Vught.

titleParts.glossary: Shelter for women who experience violence from their partner or family. The shelter is secured; sometimes the location is secret.

statements.title: The municipality should prevent new construction outside existing village boundaries.
The municipality should designate more parking spaces as charging points for electric cars.
It should be possible for farmers to build houses themselves on their land.
Vught should develop more business parks.
The municipality must continue to give refugees with a residence permit priority for social housing.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet vluchtelingen met een

titleParts.glossary: The right to reside in the Netherlands. The term can refer to the right itself or to the card that shows someone has that right.
A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

statements.title: Vught should renovate the clubhouse of football club Real Lunet.
The center of Vught should become car-free.
Recreation park De IJzeren Man in Vught should be allowed to expand to include a hotel.
